channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Huge crack and dip in the road, 13th April
item.description:
This dip in the road caused by caving has been here for years and is getting larger and every time it rains it retains lots of water which attracts nuisance.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed divans, carpet and household items, 13th April
item.description:
Large Household items have been left on the street for over a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sedan Way, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish, 13th April
item.description:
Rubbish has been left since last week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Webb court 5th and 3rd floor spikes required, 13th April
item.description:
Hello Please could spikes be placed on the 5th and 3rd floor bin areas I:E on external lights and above electricity cupboards to prevent pigeons from sitting there and fouling over the floor. The address is.. Webb court Titmuss avenue Thamesmead London SE28 Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Attlee Road, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repair u/s, 13th April
item.description:
This was replaced just a few weeks ago and when replaced it had cracks in the new kerb which have since broken away causing us trip and damage hazard to pedestrians and cars alike.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Longmeadow Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: High quantity of waste fly tipped in our estate, 13th April
item.description:
Noticed a large amount of waste from garden materials, old metal rods, paint materials, bbq things and more dumped outside our estate. The location is Rowe house, Chatham place. This is a hazard to the local community and a danger to the small children.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mead Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on opposite corner of Lavender and Malvern, 13th April
item.description:
This one has been there since Friday. Despite best attempts it keeps falling (or being moved) to block the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface surrounding metal cover collapsing., 13th April
item.description:
The surface round this cover is collapsing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Christchurch Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 38/40, 13th April
item.description:
Toilet on pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly tip on corner of Lavender and Malvern, 13th April
item.description:
Appeared overnight

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kilburn Place street, Last Light Column, 13th April
item.description:
The door cover of the last column has been removed by squatters. Can you please sort this out, as all the cables are exposed now. Thank you in advance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kilburn Place, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The verges along the cycle path are littered agai, 13th April
item.description:
Please clean them up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 302-319, Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant fly tipping outside Queens House, Merrow Street., 13th April
item.description:
This is an every day problem. Fly tipping here is horrendous, health and safety issues.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Merrow Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, 13th April
item.description:
Overflowing litter bin on the footpath by the river just opposite Cator Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pile of clothes, books etc, 13th April
item.description:
Blocking part of doorway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags and attracting vermin, 13th April
item.description:
Rubbish has been left outside property for more than 5 days and it is accumulating, which is also attracting vermin. There is now faeces nearby too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sense 283-285 Bexley Road, 13th April
item.description:
A double mattress has been dumped on the pavement outside of the charity shop. Please can this be removed asap ,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 248, Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 13th April
item.description:
Dumped car still car no road tax time to remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Featherstone Avenue, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped, 13th April
item.description:
Fly tipped bed frame outside number 27/29

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Derby Hill Crescent, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.title: Bin, 13th April
item.description:
A croydon council bin has been left in driveway next to sub station on Fairfield road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
